summary: High‑quality audience tape of an electrifying 1974 show with a soaring China Cat Sunflower / I Know You Rider and superb guitar work.
review: The recording captures a vibrant performance that many fans describe as one of the best from ’74, highlighted by a flowing China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider stretch, an inspired rendition of The Greatest Story Ever Told, and a beautiful Wharf Rat.  Sound quality is praised as above‑average for an audience source, with clear guitars (though drums sit a bit low).  While most listeners are enthusiastic, a few find the set flat or unlistenable, giving the overall impression a mixed but largely positive reception.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of detailed reviews rate the show and recording very highly (5‑star), noting excellent setlist, strong playing, and good sound quality; a few low‑star outliers lower the average but do not dominate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and balanced for an audience tape; guitars stand out, drums are a bit low in mix, but overall better than many comparable audience recordings.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans praise the seamless flow of the second‑set sequence (China Cat / Rider) and a setlist that feels both sweet and energetic, though a minority felt the performance was flat.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar work praised as flowing, creative and beautifully voiced; tone described as perfect by several reviewers.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drum levels noted as a little low in the mix.
